title: ricinocarpus platyphyllus
intro: Ricinocarpus platyphyllus is a plant species, also known as the Australian hibiscus, which belongs to the family Malvaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Australian Aboriginal culture, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ricinocarpus platyphyllus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. The herbal preparations of Ricinocarpus platyphyllus typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves or flowers, which can be used to make teas, ointments, or poultices for topical application.
